title: Third Person Hold button for PVP
description: Simply hold left alt to switch to 3rd person and release to switch to back to privious perspective.
body:
# Perspective Hold Mod

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/90RvxZeB?label=Supported%20Versions&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/90RvxZeB)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green.svg?style=for-the-badge)](LICENSE)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-9d4b9d?style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/)

> **Hold to Peek**: A lightweight Fabric mod that adds hold-to-third-person functionality to Minecraft!

## Features

### Core Functionality
- **Hold Left Alt** to temporarily switch to third-person perspective
- **
- **Release Left Alt** to automatically return to your original perspective
- **Seamless integration** with Minecraft's existing perspective system
- **Smart switching** - only changes perspective when needed

### Technical Details
- **Client-side only** - no server installation required
- **Zero configuration needed** - works out of the box
- **Performance friendly** - minimal impact on game performance
- **Conflict-free** - designed not to interfere with other keybinds

## 🚀 How It Works

1. **Normal gameplay**: Play in first-person (or any other perspective)
2. **Hold Left Alt**: Instantly switches to third-person perspective
3. **Release Left Alt**: Automatically returns to your previous perspective
4. **Seamless transition**: No manual switching required!

### Use Cases
- **Combat**: Quick situational awareness in PvP
- **Screenshots**: Quick perspective changes for perfect shots

##  Installation

### Requirements
- **Minecraft**: 1.21.4 :more support later
- **Fabric Loader**: > 18.0.0
- **Fabric API**: Required , any

### Installation Steps
1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Download the latest [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download Perspective Hold Mod from Modrinth
4. Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder
5. Launch Minecraft with Fabric profile

## 📋 Compatibility

| Category | Status | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| **Mod Loader** | ✅ Fabric | Forge not supported |
| **Multiplayer** | ✅ Full | Works on all servers |
| **Sodium/Iris** | ✅ Compatible | Tested and working |
| **Other Mods** | ✅ Generally compatible | Client-side only |

## 🎯 Configuration

**No configuration needed!** The mod works perfectly with default settings.

Want to change the keybind? Simply use Minecraft's Controls menu:
1. Open **Options** → **Controls**
2. Search for "Perspective Hold"
3. Rebind to your preferred key

## Technical Information

### For Modpack Developers
```yaml
# Modrinth metadata
mod_id: later....
version: later...
dependencies:
  - fabric-api: "*"
  - minecraft: "1.21.4"
